raw.message: Destroy enemy robots, dominate the battlefield!

hook.summary: High-action gameplay showing a powerful robot securing multiple kills in a city environment.
hook.visual_action: A four-armed robot walks through a city, locks onto an enemy, and fires its heavy weaponry.

scene_flow: Robot navigates a city environment while targeting an enemy in the distance.
Robot engages and destroys the enemy, triggering 'KILL' and 'RAMPAGE' UI notifications.
Camera zooms into a futuristic mechanical hatch transition.
Final brand reveal with the game logo and call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 interested in competitive sci-fi shooters and mech combat.
